title: psathyrotes annua
intro: Psathyrotes annua, also known as desert holly or prickly globemallow, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Psathyrotes annua can be used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
